name: Derek Patchfield
title: MMS Presenter · ConfigMgr Specialist
bio: Configuration Manager admin turned PowerShell junkie. Speaker at MMS and other community events. Maintains several open-source CM tools.

name: Mara Cloudson
title: Microsoft Endpoint Management MVP
bio: Intune architect and automation enthusiast. 10 years deploying Windows at scale; now writing about it so you don't have to re-invent the wheel.

name: Sofia Enrollez
title: Microsoft MVP · Modern Workplace
bio: Helping organizations move to cloud-managed endpoints. Writes about Autopilot, Entra ID, and the chaos in between.
